prompt: I have a Nextflow workflow file at workflows/rnaseq.nf with a sub-workflow called RNASEQ_ALIGN that takes a channel of reads (tuples of meta + fastq files) and a genome index path, runs STAR_ALIGN and SAMTOOLS_SORT internally, and emits 'bam' and 'versions' channels. Write a complete nf-test workflow test for it. I want to test that it succeeds, that the bam channel has the right number of elements, and that the workflow runs the correct number of tasks.

assertions.text: References script workflows/rnaseq.nf and workflow RNASEQ_ALIGN
Has when { workflow { ... } } block with channel inputs
